name: SPEC-211-CRM-Security-Audit-Refactor
description: Fix 5 P0 + 6 P1 security findings from CRM audit — auth, IDOR, credential leak, session fixation

tasks.description: P0-1: Change prompts router from publicProcedure to protectedProcedure, add teamId scoping
P0-2: Add teamId scoping to email campaigns (list + create)
P0-3: Add teamId scoping to journal entries, fix getByUser IDOR
P0-4: Exclude apiKey from MCP connector list/getById responses
tasks.old_string:
const conectores = await db.mcpConectores.where({ teamId }).select('*');
		return conectores;

tasks.description: P0-4: Exclude apiKey from MCP connector getById response
tasks.old_string: const conector = await db.mcpConectores.where({ id: input.id }).select('*').take();

tasks.description: P0-5: Remove teamId from register input, assign server-side. Fix auth leak.
P0-5b: Remove teamId from create user, P1-4: Fix auth leak generic error
P0-5c: Remove teamId from user creation (server assigns)
P1-1: Add session regeneration before setSession (fix session fixation)
P1-2: Add state:true to OAuth2 config for CSRF protection
P1-3: Add DEV_AUTH_ENABLED guard + remove placeholder userId
P1-1b: Add session regeneration to setSession for loginWithPassword
Run typecheck to verify all changes compile

tasks.command: cd /srv/monorepo && pnpm biome lint apps/api/src/modules/prompts/prompts.trpc.ts apps/api/src/modules/email/email.trpc.ts apps/api/src/modules/journal-entries/journal_entries.trpc.ts apps/api/src/modules/mcp-connectors/mcp-conectores.trpc.ts apps/api/src/modules/auth/auth.trpc.ts apps/api/src/modules/auth/oauth2/oauth2_succes_error_handler.auth.utils.ts apps/api/src/modules/auth/oauth2/google-oauth2.auth.plugin.ts apps/api/src/middlewares/dev-auth-bypass.ts apps/api/src/modules/auth/session.auth.utils.ts 2>&1 | tail -20

tasks.description: Rebuild CRM API Docker container and verify health
tasks.command: cd /srv/monorepo && docker restart crm-api && sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:4001/health 2>&1 | head -5
